servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\") {\n526\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include nested field path\")\n527\t\t}\n528\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected integer, got string\") {\n529\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include type information\")\n530\t\t}\n531\t\n532\t\t// Verify context\n533\t\tctxMsg := err.Context()\n534\t\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"field: servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\") {\n535\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include field path\")\n536\t\t}\n537\t\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"expected type: integer\") {\n538\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include expected type\")\n539\t\t}\n540\t\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"actual type: string\") {\n541\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include actual type\")\n542\t\t}\n543\t}\n544\t\n545\t// TestTypeMismatchWithoutLine demonstrates type mismatch error without line number\n546\t//\n547\t// Format: \"type mismatch in <file>, field <field-path>: expected <expected>, got <actual>\"\n548\t//\n549\t// Example output:\n550\t//\n551\t//\ttype mismatch in data.yaml, field database.timeout: expected integer, got boolean\n552\tfunc TestTypeMismatchWithoutLine(t *testing.T) {\n553\t\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n554\t\t\tFilePath:     \"data.yaml\",\n555\t\t\tFieldPath:    \"database.timeout\",\n556\t\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n557\t\t\tActualType:   \"boolean\",\n558\t\t\tValue:        \"true\",\n559\t\t\tLine:         0,\n560\t\t}\n561\t\n562\t\texpected := \"type mismatch in data.yaml, field database.timeout: expected integer, got boolean\"\n563\t\tif err.Error() != expected {\n564\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n565\t\t}\n566\t\n567\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n568\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"type mismatch in data.yaml\") {\n569\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path without line number\")\n570\t\t}\n571\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field database.timeout\") {\n572\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n573\t\t}\n574\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected integer, got boolean\") {\n575\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include type information\")\n576\t\t}\n577\t}\n578\t\n579\t// ============================================================================\n580\t// Section 4: Real-world error scenarios\n581\t// ============================================================================\n582\t\n583\t// TestRealWorldConfigFileError demonstrates a realistic configuration file error scenario\n584\t//\n585\t// Scenario: Invalid port configuration in service config\n586\t//\n587\t// config.yaml:\n588\t//\n589\t//\tservices:\n590\t//\t  - name: web\n591\t//\t    port: \"8080\"  # ERROR: should be integer, not string\n592\t//\n593\t// Error output:\n594\t//\n595\t//\ttype mismatch in config.yaml at line 5, field services[0].port: expected integer, got string\n596\tfunc TestRealWorldConfigFileError(t *testing.T) {\n597\t\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n598\t\t\tFilePath:     \"config.yaml\",\n599\t\t\tFieldPath:    \"services[0].port\",\n600\t\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n601\t\t\tActualType:   \"string\",\n602\t\t\tValue:        \"\\\"8080\\\"\",\n603\t\t\tLine:         5,\n604\t\t}\n605\t\n606\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n607\t\n608\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n609\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n610\t\t}\n611\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 5\") {\n612\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n613\t\t}\n614\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field services[0].port\") {\n615\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field with array index\")\n616\t\t}\n617\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected integer, got string\") {\n618\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include type mismatch\")\n619\t\t}\n620\t}\n621\t\n622\t// TestRealWorldValidationError demonstrates a realistic validation error scenario\n623\t//\n624\t// Scenario: Port number out of valid range\n625\t//\n626\t// config.yaml:\n627\t//\n628\t//\tserver:\n629\t//\t  port: 70000  # ERROR: out of range (1-65535)\n630\t//\n631\t// Error output:\n632\t//\n633\t//\tconstraint violation in config.yaml at line 10, field server.port: must be between 1-65535\n634\tfunc TestRealWorldValidationError(t *testing.T) {\n635\t\terr := &ConstraintError{\n636\t\t\tFilePath:       \"config.yaml\",\n637\t\t\tFieldPath:      \"server.port\",\n638\t\t\tConstraintType: \"range\",\n639\t\t\tConstraint:     \"must be between 1-65535\",\n640\t\t\tValue:          \"70000\",\n641\t\t\tLine:           10,\n642\t\t}\n643\t\n644\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n645\t\n646\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n647\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n648\t\t}\n649\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 10\") {\n650\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n651\t\t}\n652\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field server.port\") {\n653\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n654\t\t}\n655\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"must be between 1-65535\") {\n656\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include constraint\")\n657\t\t}\n658\t\n659\t\t// Verify context\n660\t\tctxMsg := err.Context()\n661\t\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"field: server.port\") {\n662\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include field path\")\n663\t\t}\n664\t\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"constraint: must be between 1-65535\") {\n665\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include constraint\")\n666\t\t}\n667\t\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"value: 70000\") {\n668\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include actual value\")\n669\t\t}\n670\t}\n671\t\n672\t// TestRealWorldFieldNotFoundError demonstrates a realistic missing field error scenario\n673\t//\n674\t// Scenario: Required field is missing\n675\t//\n676\t// config.yaml:\n677\t//\n678\t//\tdatabase:\n679\t//\t  host: localhost\n680\t//\t  # ERROR: missing required field 'port'\n681\t//\n682\t// Error output:\n683\t//\n684\t//\trequired field missing in config.yaml at line 8: database.port\n685\tfunc TestRealWorldFieldNotFoundError(t *testing.T) {\n686\t\terr := NewFieldNotFoundError(\"config.yaml\", \"database.port\", 8, \"\")\n687\t\n688\t\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n689\t\n690\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"required field missing\") {\n691\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include error type\")\n692\t\t}\n693\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n694\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n695\t\t}\n696\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 8\") {\n697\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n698\t\t}\n699\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"database.port\") {\n700\t\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n701\t\t}\n702\t\n703\t\t// Verify context\n704\t\tctxMsg := err.Context()\n705\t\tif !contains(ctxMsg, \"required field not found: database.port\") {\n706\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include field path\")\n707\t\t}\n708\t\n709\t\t// Verify error type\n710\t\tif err.YAMLErrorType() != ErrorTypeFieldNotFound {\n711\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"YAMLErrorType() = %q, want %q\", err.YAMLErrorType(), ErrorTypeFieldNotFound)\n712\t\t}\n713\t}\n714\t\n715\t// ============================================================================\n716\t// Section 5: Error message format consistency\n717\t// ============================================================================\n718\t\n719\t// TestErrorFormatConsistency verifies that error formats follow consistent patterns\n720\t//\n721\t// Consistency rules:\n722\t// 1. File path always present if available\n723\t// 2. Position (line, column) follows file path with \"at line <line>, column <column>\" format\n724\t// 3. Field paths use \"at field <path>\" or \"field <path>:\" format\n725\t// 4. Type mismatches use \"expected <expected>, got <actual>\" format\n726\t// 5. Constraints use \"(constraint: <details>)\" or \"constraint: <details>\" format\n727\tfunc TestErrorFormatConsistency(t *testing.T) {\n728\t\t// Test ParseError format consistency\n729\t\tparseErr := NewParseError(\"config.yaml\", \"test\", 10, 5, \"\", \"\", \"\")\n730\t\tif !contains(parseErr.Error(), \"parse error in\") {\n731\t\t\tt.Error(\"ParseError should start with 'parse error in'\")\n732\t\t}\n733\t\tif !contains(parseErr.Error(), \"at line 10, column 5\") {\n734\t\t\tt.Error(\"ParseError should include position with 'at line X, column Y'\")\n735\t\t}\n736\t\n737\t\t// Test ValidationError format consistency\n738\t\tvalidationErr := NewValidationError(\"config.yaml\", \"test\", \"server.port\", \"constraint\", \"\", 10, 5, \"\", \"\")\n739\t\tif !contains(validationErr.Error(), \"validation error in\") {\n740\t\t\tt.Error(\"ValidationError should start with 'validation error in'\")\n741\t\t}\n742\t\tif !contains(validationErr.Error(), \"at field server.port\") {\n743\t\t\tt.Error(\"ValidationError should include 'at field <path>'\")\n744\t\t}\n745\t\n746\t\t// Test TypeMismatchError format consistency\n747\t\ttypeErr := &TypeMismatchError{\n748\t\t\tFilePath:     \"config.yaml\",\n749\t\t\tFieldPath:    \"server.port\",\n750\t\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n751\t\t\tActualType:   \"string\",\n752\t\t\tLine:         10,\n753\t\t}\n754\t\tif !contains(typeErr.Error(), \"type mismatch in\") {\n755\t\t\tt.Error(\"TypeMismatchError should start with 'type mismatch in'\")\n756\t\t}\n757\t\tif !contains(typeErr.Error(), \"expected integer, got string\") {\n758\t\t\tt.Error(\"TypeMismatchError should use 'expected X, got Y' format\")\n759\t\t}\n760\t\n761\t\t// Test ConstraintError format consistency\n762\t\tconstraintErr := &ConstraintError{\n763\t\t\tFilePath:       \"config.yaml\",\n764\t\t\tFieldPath:      \"server.port\",\n765\t\t\tConstraint:     \"must be between 1-65535\",\n766\t\t\tLine:           10,\n767\t\t}\n768\t\tif !contains(constraintErr.Error(), \"constraint violation in\") {\n769\t\t\tt.Error(\"ConstraintError should start with 'constraint violation in'\")\n770\t\t}\n771\t\tif !contains(constraintErr.Error(), \"must be between 1-65535\") {\n772\t\t\tt.Error(\"ConstraintError should include constraint\")\n773\t\t}\n774\t}\n775\t\n776\t// TestErrorContextFormat verifies that Context() methods provide structured information\n777\tfunc TestErrorContextFormat(t *testing.T) {\n778\t\t// Test TypeMismatchError Context()\n779\t\ttypeErr := &TypeMismatchError{\n780\t\t\tFieldPath:    \"server.port\",\n781\t\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n782\t\t\tActualType:   \"string\",\n783\t\t\tValue:        \"8080\",\n784\t\t}\n785\t\tctx := typeErr.Context()\n786\t\tif !contains(ctx, \"field: server.port\") {\n787\t\t\tt.Error(\"Context should include 'field: <path>'\")\n788\t\t}\n789\t\tif !contains(ctx, \"expected type: integer\") Package yamlutil test file documenting error message formats\n//\n// This test file demonstrates and verifies all error message formats across the ARMOR codebase.\n// It serves as both test coverage and documentation for how errors are formatted and displayed.\n//\n// Error Message Format Categories\n//\n// 1. ParseError with line:column\n//    - Format: \"parse error in <file> at line <line>, column <column>: <message>\"\n//    - Example: \"parse error in config.yaml at line 10, column 5: missing colon\"\n//\n// 2. ValidationError with field paths\n//    - Format: \"validation error in <file> at line <line>, column <column> at field <field-path>: <message> (constraint: <constraint>)\"\n//    - Example: \"validation error in config.yaml at line 15, column 12 at field server.port: port must be between 1 and 65535 (constraint: must be between 1-65535)\"\n//\n// 3. Type mismatch errors\n//    - Format: \"type mismatch in <file> at line <line>, field <field-path>: expected <expected>, got <actual>\"\n//    - Example: \"type mismatch in config.yaml at line 8, field server.port: expected integer, got string\"\n\npackage yamlutil\n\nimport (\n\t\"testing\"\n)\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Section 1: ParseError with line:column\n// ============================================================================\n\n// TestParseErrorLineColumnFullFormat demonstrates complete ParseError format with all location components\n//\n// Format: \"parse error in <file> at line <line>, column <column>: <message>\"\n//\n// Example output:\n//\n//\tparse error in config.yaml at line 10, column 5: missing colon\nfunc TestParseErrorLineColumnFullFormat(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := NewParseError(\"config.yaml\", \"missing colon\", 10, 5, ErrCodeInvalidSyntax, \"\", \"\")\n\n\texpected := \"parse error in config.yaml at line 10, column 5: missing colon\"\n\tif err.Error() != expected {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify format components\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 10\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"column 5\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include column number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"missing colon\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include error message\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestParseErrorLineColumnVariations documents different location formatting scenarios\nfunc TestParseErrorLineColumnVariations(t *testing.T) {\n\ttests := []struct {\n\t\tname     string\n\t\tfilePath string\n\t\tmessage  string\n\t\tline     int\n\t\tcolumn   int\n\t\texpected string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"file + line + column (most specific)\",\n\t\t\tfilePath: \"config.yaml\",\n\t\t\tmessage:  \"test\",\n\t\t\tline:     10,\n\t\t\tcolumn:   5,\n\t\t\texpected: \"parse error in config.yaml at line 10, column 5: test\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"file + line only\",\n\t\t\tfilePath: \"config.yaml\",\n\t\t\tmessage:  \"test\",\n\t\t\tline:     10,\n\t\t\tcolumn:   0,\n\t\t\texpected: \"parse error in config.yaml at line 10: test\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:     \"file only\",\n\t\t\tfilePath: \"config.yaml\",\n\t\t\tmessage:  \"test\",\n\t\t\tline:     0,\n\t\t\tcolumn:   0,\n\t\t\texpected: \"parse error in config.yaml: test\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := range tests {\n\t\tt.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\terr := NewParseError(tt.filePath, tt.message, tt.line, tt.column, \"\", \"\", \"\")\n\t\t\tif err.Error() != tt.expected {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), tt.expected)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestParseErrorWithExpectedActual demonstrates ParseError with type information\n//\n// Format: \"parse error in <file> at line <line>, column <column>: <message> (expected: <expected>, actual: <actual>)\"\n//\n// Example output:\n//\n//\tparse error in schema.yaml at line 7, column 12: type mismatch (expected: string, actual: integer)\nfunc TestParseErrorWithExpectedActual(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := NewParseError(\"schema.yaml\", \"type mismatch\", 7, 12, ErrCodeTypeMismatch, \"string\", \"integer\")\n\n\texpected := \"parse error in schema.yaml at line 7, column 12: type mismatch (expected: string, actual: integer)\"\n\tif err.Error() != expected {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n\t}\n\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected: string\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should \"invalid syntax error\",\n\t\t\tcode:         ErrCodeInvalidSyntax,\n\t\t\texpectedType: ErrorTypeParse,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"type mismatch error\",\n\t\t\tcode:         ErrCodeTypeMismatch,\n\t\t\texpectedType: ErrorTypeParse,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"required field error\",\n\t\t\tcode:         ErrCodeRequiredField,\n\t\t\texpectedType: TestValidationErrorNestedFieldPaths documents ValidationError with various field path formats\n//\n// Field paths can be:\n// - Simple: \"server.port\"\n// - Nested: \"database.connectionPool.maxConnections\"\n// - Array access: \"servers.api.responses[0].statusCode\"\nfunc TestValidationErrorNestedFieldPaths(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname      string\n\t\tfieldPath string\n\t\tmessage   string\n\t\tconstraint string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"simple dot-notation path\",\n\t\t\tfieldPath: \"server.port\",\n\t\t\tmessage:   \"port out   \"too many connections\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: \"must be between 1-100\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:      \"array access path\",\n\t\t\tfieldPath: path\",\n\t\t\tfieldPath: \"spec.template.spec.containers[0].image\",\n\t\t\tmessage:   \"invalid image tag\",\n\t\t\tconstraint: \"must match registry/*:tag pattern\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, tt := tt.message) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include message '%s'\", tt.message)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif !contains(errorMsg, tt.constraint) {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Should include constraint '%s'\", tt.constraint)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestValidationErrorWithLineAndColumn demonstrates ValidationError with position information\n//\n// Format: \"validation error in <file> at line <line>, TestValidationErrorWithoutFieldPath demonstrates ValidationError without field path\n//\n// Format: \"validation error in <file>: <message>\"\n//\n// Example output:\n//\n//\tvalidation error in message\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestValidationErrorComplete demonstrates complete ValidationError with all components\n//\n// Format breakdown:\n// - Location: \"<file>:<line>:<column>\" or \"<file>\"\n// - Error type: \"validation error in\"\n// - Field path: \"at field <field-path>\"\n// - Message: The specific validation failure\n// - Constraint: \"(constraint: <details>)\"\n//\n// Example:\n//\n//\tvalidation error in deployment.yaml at line 22, column 18 at field spec.template.spec.containers[0].image: invalid image tag (constraint: must match registry/*:tag pattern)\nfunc TestValidationErrorComplete(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := NewValidationError(\"deployment.yaml\", \"invalid image tag\", \"spec.template.spec.containers[0].image\", \"must match registry/*:tag pattern\", path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 22, column 18\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line and column\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at field spec.template.spec.containers[0].image\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"invalid image tag\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include message\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"constraint: must match registry/*:tag pattern\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include constraint\")\n\t}\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Section 3: Type mismatch errors\n// ============================================================================\n\n// TestTypeMismatchErrorFormat demonstrates type mismatch error format\n//\n// Format: \"type mismatch in <file> at line <line>, field <field-path>: expected <expected>, got <actual>\"\n//\n// Example output:\n//\n//\ttype mismatch in config.yaml at line 8, field server.port: expected integer, got string\nfunc TestTypeMismatchErrorFormat(t *testing.T) {\n\terr := &TypeMismatchError{\n\t\tFilePath:     \"config.yaml\",\n\t\tFieldPath:    \"server.port\",\n\t\tExpectedType: \"integer\",\n\t\tActualType:   \"string\",\n\t\tValue:        \"8080\",\n\t\tLine:         8,\n\t}\n\n\texpected := \"type mismatch in config.yaml at line 8, field server.port: expected integer, got string\"\n\tif err.Error() != expected {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Error() = %q, want %q\", err.Error(), expected)\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify format\n\terrorMsg := err.Error()\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"type mismatch in\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include error type\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"config.yaml\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include file path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"at line 8\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include line number\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"field server.port\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include field path\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"expected integer\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include expected type\")\n\t}\n\tif !contains(errorMsg, \"got string\") {\n\t\tt.Error(\"Should include actual type\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Verify Context() method\n\tctxMsg := err.Context()\n\texpectedCtx := \"field: server.port, expected type: integer, actual type: string, value: 8080\"\n\tif ctxMsg != expectedCtx {\n\t\tt.Errorf(\"Context() = %q, want %q\", ctxMsg, expectedCtx)\n\t}\n}\n\n// TestTypeMismatchVariousTypes documents type mismatch errors for various type combinations\n//\n// Common type mismatches:\n// - Expected integer, got string\n// - Expected string, got integer\n// - Expected boolean, got string\n// - Expected array, got scalar\n// - Expected object, got null\nfunc TestTypeMismatchVariousTypes(t *testing.T) {\n\ttestCases := []struct {\n\t\tname         string\n\t\tfieldPath    string\n\t\texpectedType string\n\t\tactualType   string\n\t\tvalue        string\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname:         \"integer expected, string
